From a "tactical nuisance" to an operational nightmare: How did the Resistance's #FPV drones shatter the Israeli occupation's technological edge?

The confrontation along the southern Lebanese border is no longer a conventional exchange of fire, after the Resistance has introduced a weapon that may appear "simple" in design, yet devastating in effect.

Fiber-optic-guided loitering FPV drones have become the primary concern for both Israeli media and its occupation forces. Not only do they bypass advanced jamming systems, but they also penetrate deep into the so-called "security belt", redefining the rules of engagement.

A majority of Americans believe the #US decision to launch a war on Iran was a mistake and fear it will worsen conditions at home, according to a joint ABC News, Washington Post, and Ipsos poll. 

Around six in 10 Americans said #Washington’s military action against Iran was the wrong move, compared with just over one-third who viewed it as the right decision.

Two Israeli soldiers were wounded earlier on Friday in an explosive-laden drone attack in southern #Lebanon, an IOF spokesperson said.

He added that the two were evacuated to a hospital for medical treatment.  

On April 30, one Israeli soldier was killed and several others were wounded in an explosive drone attack in southern Lebanon, the Israeli occupation forces admitted.
